phase1.explanation:
🤖 **Accessibility makes your app usable for everyone.**

**Accessibility features:**

| Feature | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| Content description | Describe UI elements |
| State description | Describe state |
| Heading | Navigate by sections |
| Role | Semantic role |
| Live region | Announce changes |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Accessibility is not optional. Make your app for everyone."

**Best practices:**
1. Add content descriptions
2. Use semantic roles
3. Support TalkBack
4. Test with accessibility tools
5. Provide alternative navigation

phase2.errorMessage:
1. No content description → inaccessible
2. No label → inaccessible
3. No role → inaccessible
4. No heading → inaccessible
5. Wrong description → confused users
6. No keyboard → inaccessible
7. No TalkBack → inaccessible
